# cloudflare_flagship_app (Resource)

Accepted Permissions

- `Flagship Read`
- `Flagship Write`

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cloudflare_flagship_app" "example_flagship_app" {
  account_id = "account_id"
  name = "x"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (String) Cloudflare account ID.
- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String)
- `updated_by` (String) Email of the actor who last modified the app, or `edge-gateway` for gateway-authenticated changes.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
$ terraform import cloudflare_flagship_app.example '<account_id>/<app_id>'
```
